generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how our allies' inconsistent commitments undermine our security. The data is clear: nations that rely too much on alliances often find themselves exposed when partners hesitate. We need to prioritize self-reliance in defense while maintaining strategic partnerships. #NationalSecurity #AllianceBurdenSharing
